steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question tests logical transitions. The first sentence states the established belief that Mauna Loa is Earth's largest shield volcano; the second sentence introduces a 2020 study showing Pūhāhonu is significantly larger. The blank must signal that the second sentence contradicts the first.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Secondly,: signals addition of a secondary point; incorrectly implies the second sentence supports rather than refutes the first. ✗
  • Choice B — Consequently,: signals a result or consequence; incorrectly implies the second sentence follows from the first rather than contradicts it. ✗
  • Choice C — Moreover,: signals continuation or reinforcement; incorrectly implies the second sentence adds to rather than contrasts with the first. ✗
  • Choice D — However,: signals contrast or refutation; correctly marks the opposition between the long-held assumption and the new contradicting study. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
